svg.title: SOC Ticket Live Database ER Diagram
svg.desc: Entity relationship diagram for the running PostgreSQL database ticketdata after legacy customer/project tables were removed.
svg.text: SOC Ticket Live Database ER Diagram
Source: running PostgreSQL database ticketdata in Docker. Checked 2026-07-06.
Legacy customer/project tables were removed from the live DB and repo; this diagram reflects the remaining active schema.

g.text: PK = primary key, UQ = unique, FK = foreign key, JSONB/INET are PostgreSQL column types.
Standard Django tables omitted from diagram body
auth_group, auth_permission, auth_user_groups, auth_user_user_permissions, auth_group_permissions, django_admin_log, django_content_type, django_migrations, django_session.
